name: Diablo
description: Diablo is one of the main protagonists of That Time I Got Reincarnated As a Slime. He is one of the seven Demon Primordials, serving as the origin for the "black" demons. Originally a powerful archdemon, he was summoned by Rimuru, whom he pledges his loyalty to, evolving into a demon duke after being named.
creator: Jadejane
